title: Stevie Nicks 24 Karat Gold the Concert
original_title: Stevie Nicks 24 Karat Gold The Concert
overview: Recorded over two nights in Indianapolis and Pittsburg, the concert film highlights Stevie Nick’s career-spanning setlist, her animated storytelling, and special moments with Tom Petty, Prince, Lindsey Buckingham, and others.
